name: Hare Dashboard Core Features
description: Core dashboard features to make Hare a production-ready AI agent platform with versioning, monitoring, audit logging, and enhanced user experience

userStories.title: Add agent version tracking schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database schema to track agent versions so deployment history can be stored
acceptanceCriteria: Create agent_versions table in apps/web/src/db/schema/ with fields: id, agentId, version (number), instructions, model, config (JSON), toolIds (JSON array), createdAt, createdBy
Add foreign key relationship to agents table
Generate migration with bun run db:generate
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create agent version on deploy
userStories.description: As a user, I want each agent deployment to automatically create a version record so I can track changes over time
acceptanceCriteria: Modify deploy agent API route to create version record before deployment
Version number increments automatically (max existing version + 1)
Snapshot includes: instructions, model, config, attached tool IDs
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add version history API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to fetch agent version history
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/agents/:id/versions endpoint in agents router
Return versions sorted by version number descending
Include pagination support (limit, offset)
Add Zod schema for response validation
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Display version history on agent detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see deployment history on the agent detail page so I can understand what changed
acceptanceCriteria: Add Version History tab to agent detail page
Display list of versions with: version number, date, who deployed
Show diff summary (what changed from previous version)
Use TanStack Query hook for data fetching
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Implement agent rollback API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to rollback an agent to a previous version
acceptanceCriteria: Create POST /api/agents/:id/rollback endpoint
Accept version number in request body
Restore agent config from version snapshot
Create new version record (rollback creates v+1, not destructive)
Redeploy agent with restored config
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add rollback button to version history UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to rollback to a previous version with one click
acceptanceCriteria: Add Rollback button on each version in history list
Show confirmation dialog before rollback with version details
Display success/error toast after rollback
Refresh version list after successful rollback
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create audit_logs database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database schema to store audit log entries for compliance tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Create audit_logs table with fields: id, workspaceId, userId, action (enum), resourceType, resourceId, details (JSON), ipAddress, userAgent, createdAt

Action enum includes: agent.create, agent.update, agent.delete, agent.deploy, tool.create, tool.update, tool.delete, member.invite, member.remove, member.role_change, apikey.create, apikey.revoke, workspace.update
Add index on workspaceId and createdAt for efficient queries
Generate migration
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create audit logging utility function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable utility to log audit events from API routes
acceptanceCriteria: Create logAuditEvent function in apps/web/src/lib/api/audit.ts
Function accepts: context (Hono context), action, resourceType, resourceId, details
Automatically extracts userId, workspaceId, IP, userAgent from context
Function is async and non-blocking (doesn't slow down API responses)
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add audit logging to agent routes
userStories.description: As a compliance officer, I want all agent actions logged for security auditing
acceptanceCriteria: Log agent.create when agent is created
Log agent.update when agent settings are modified
Log agent.delete when agent is deleted
Log agent.deploy when agent is deployed
Include relevant details in each log entry
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add audit logging to tool and team routes
userStories.description: As a compliance officer, I want tool and team changes logged
acceptanceCriteria: Log tool.create, tool.update, tool.delete in tools router
Log member.invite, member.remove, member.role_change in workspace members router
Log apikey.create, apikey.revoke in API keys router
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create audit logs API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to query audit logs with filtering
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/audit-logs endpoint
Support filters: action, resourceType, userId, dateFrom, dateTo
Support pagination with limit and offset
Return total count for pagination UI
Restrict access to workspace admins and owners only
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build audit logs page UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to view audit logs in a searchable table
acceptanceCriteria: Create /dashboard/audit-logs route
Display table with columns: Date, User, Action, Resource, Details
Add filter dropdowns for action type and resource type
Add date range picker for filtering
Implement pagination controls
Add link to audit logs in settings navigation
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add agent health metrics calculation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to calculate agent health metrics from usage data
acceptanceCriteria: Create getAgentHealthMetrics function that queries usage table
Calculate: success rate (%), average latency, error count, total requests (last 24h)
Derive health status: healthy (>95% success), degraded (80-95%), unhealthy (<80%)
Add to agents API or create dedicated health endpoint
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create agent health widget component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see agent health at a glance on the agent detail page
acceptanceCriteria: Create AgentHealthWidget component in apps/web/src/components/
Display: success rate with progress ring, average latency, error count badge
Show health status indicator (green/yellow/red dot with label)
Add link to view detailed logs when errors exist
Auto-refresh data every 30 seconds
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add health widget to agent detail page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the health widget prominently on my agent's page
acceptanceCriteria: Add AgentHealthWidget to agent detail page header area
Position alongside existing agent info (name, status, etc.)
Handle loading and error states gracefully
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add conversation search API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to search through conversation messages
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/agents/:id/conversations/search endpoint
Accept query parameter for full-text search on message content
Accept dateFrom and dateTo parameters for date filtering
Return matching messages with conversation context (id, title)
Highlight matching text in results
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build conversation search UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search through past conversations with my agent
acceptanceCriteria: Add search input to agent conversations page
Display results as message snippets with highlighted matches
Show conversation title and date for each result
Click result navigates to full conversation with message scrolled into view
Add date range filter alongside search
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add conversation export API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to export conversations in multiple formats
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/conversations/:id/export endpoint
Accept format query param: json, csv, txt
JSON format includes full message metadata and tool calls
CSV format includes: timestamp, role, content columns
TXT format is human-readable plain text
Set appropriate Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add export button to conversation view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export a conversation for analysis or compliance
acceptanceCriteria: Add Export dropdown button to conversation header
Options: Export as JSON, Export as CSV, Export as Text
Trigger file download on click
Show loading state during export
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add agent clone API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to duplicate an agent
acceptanceCriteria: Create POST /api/agents/:id/clone endpoint
Copy all agent properties: name (with ' (Copy)' suffix), description, instructions, model, config
Copy tool attachments to new agent
New agent starts in draft status
Return new agent ID and redirect URL
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add clone button to agent UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to duplicate an agent as a starting point for a new one
acceptanceCriteria: Add Clone button to agent card dropdown menu in agents list
Add Clone button to agent detail page actions
Show confirmation with new agent name preview
Redirect to new agent edit page after clone
Show success toast with link to new agent
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create webhook delivery tracking schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store webhook delivery attempts for debugging
acceptanceCriteria: Create webhook_deliveries table with: id, webhookId, event, payload (JSON), status (pending/success/failed), statusCode, responseBody, attemptCount, nextRetryAt, createdAt
Add index on webhookId and createdAt
Generate migration
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Implement webhook delivery with retry logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I need webhook delivery to record attempts and retry on failure
acceptanceCriteria: Modify webhook dispatch to create delivery record before sending
Update delivery record with response status and body
Implement exponential backoff retry (3 attempts: 1min, 5min, 30min)
Mark delivery as failed after max retries exceeded
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add webhook delivery history API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to fetch webhook delivery history
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/webhooks/:id/deliveries endpoint
Return deliveries sorted by createdAt descending
Include pagination support
Add POST /api/webhooks/:id/deliveries/:deliveryId/retry for manual retry
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build webhook delivery history UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see webhook delivery status and retry failed deliveries
acceptanceCriteria: Add Deliveries tab to webhook detail page
Display table: Event, Status (badge), Response Code, Timestamp
Expandable row shows request/response payload
Add Retry button for failed deliveries
Show retry count and next retry time for pending retries
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add cost breakdown to analytics
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see cost breakdown by agent to understand spending
acceptanceCriteria: Add cost per agent chart to analytics dashboard
Calculate cost from usage table (tokens * model pricing)
Display as horizontal bar chart sorted by cost descending
Add cost column to usage by agent table
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add cost projection widget
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see projected monthly cost based on current usage
acceptanceCriteria: Add Projected Cost card to analytics dashboard
Calculate projection: (current period cost / days elapsed) * days in month
Show comparison to last month (% change)
Display warning if projection exceeds budget threshold
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create tool testing sandbox API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to execute a tool with test inputs
acceptanceCriteria: Create POST /api/tools/:id/test endpoint
Accept input object matching tool's input schema
Execute tool in isolated context
Return tool output or error details
Log test execution (don't count toward usage)
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build tool testing sandbox UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to test my tools before attaching them to agents
acceptanceCriteria: Add Test tab to tool detail/edit page
Generate form fields from tool's input schema (using shadcn form)
Execute Test button sends inputs to test API
Display formatted response or error message
Show execution time
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create real-time activity feed API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to fetch recent agent activity across workspace
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/activity endpoint
Return recent events: agent invocations, tool calls, errors
Support filter by agentId
Return last 50 entries by default with cursor pagination
Include event type, agent name, timestamp, summary
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build activity feed widget for dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see live agent activity on the dashboard home
acceptanceCriteria: Create ActivityFeed component
Display scrollable list of recent events
Each entry shows: icon (by type), agent name, action summary, relative time
Click entry expands to show details
Add filter dropdown for agent selection
Poll for updates every 10 seconds (or use optimistic updates)
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Add activity feed to dashboard home
userStories.description: As a user, I want the activity feed visible on my main dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Add ActivityFeed widget to dashboard home page
Position in right column or below stats cards
Show 'View All' link to full activity log page
Handle empty state (no recent activity)
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Create onboarding tour data structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a data structure to define onboarding tour steps
acceptanceCriteria: Create tour steps config in apps/web/src/lib/onboarding/
Each step has: id, target selector, title, description, position
Define steps for: sidebar navigation, create agent button, tools page, analytics, settings
Add user_preferences column for tour_completed boolean
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Build onboarding tour component
userStories.description: As a new user, I want a guided tour to understand the dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Create OnboardingTour component using a tooltip/popover approach
Highlight current step target element with overlay
Show step content with Next/Skip/Back buttons
Track current step in local state
Mark tour complete in user preferences on finish or skip
bun run checks passes

userStories.title: Trigger tour for new users and add replay option
userStories.description: As a user, I want the tour to start automatically and be replayable
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-start tour on first dashboard visit (check tour_completed preference)
Add 'Take a Tour' button in help menu or settings
Clicking replay resets tour state and starts from beginning
Tour works across page navigation (persists step)
bun run checks passes
